99	      "body": "Created new term **vesicle membrane tethering activity** (GO:7770062) as a child of [GO:0140177 membrane-membrane adaptor activity](https://www.ebi.ac.uk/QuickGO/term/GO:0140177).\n\n**Definition:** A membrane-membrane adaptor activity that provides the first point of contact and physically bridges the vesicle membrane and its target membrane prior to vesicle docking and fusion.\n\n**References:**\n- `PMID:19887069` — Sztul & Lupashin 2009, *FEBS Lett*, \"Role of vesicle tethering factors in the ER-Golgi membrane traffic\" (as requested)\n- `PMID:19575650` — Yu & Hughson 2010, *Annu Rev Cell Dev Biol*, \"Tethering factors as organizers of intracellular vesicular traffic\" — a broad review covering tethering factors across intracellular trafficking pathways, including the plasma-membrane exocyst and CATCHR-family complexes (Munc13 has a CATCHR/MUN-domain fold and is a key synaptic vesicle tethering factor)\n\nA note on the second reference: you asked for an article that \"also covers synaptic vesicle transport and targeting.\" Yu & Hughson 2010 is a general review that includes synaptic-relevant tethers (exocyst, CATCHR/Munc13) within its broader scope. If you'd prefer a more synapse-focused companion reference, I'd suggest `PMID:23164531` (Hallermann & Silver 2013, *Trends Neurosci*, \"Sustaining rapid vesicular release at active zones: potential roles for vesicle tethering\") or `PMID:22794257` (Südhof 2012, *Neuron*, \"The presynaptic active zone\"). Happy to swap or add — just let me know.\n\nSynonyms added:\n- `vesicle membrane tether activity` (EXACT)\n- `vesicle tethering activity` (EXACT)\n\nPR: geneontology/go-ontology#31895\n\n---\n🤖 **Generated by @dragon-ai-agent**\n- Model: `claude-opus-4-6`\n- Agent harness: claude-code\n- Triggered by: @raymond91125\n- Run: [View workflow run](https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/actions/runs/24372402903)",

file.content:
[![Build Status](https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/workflows/CI/badge.svg)](https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/actions?query=workflow%3ACI)

# Repository for GO Ontology

This repository is primarily for the developers of the GO and contains the source code for the GO ontology. 

More general documentation about GO can be found on the [GO website](http://geneontology.org/); ontology files can be downloaded from the [GO website/downloads](http://geneontology.org/docs/download-ontology/).

You should __NOT__ use this repository to download production versions of GO.

## Ontology Editors

Instructions for editing the ontology can be found in the [GO wiki/Ontology section](http://wiki.geneontology.org/index.php/Ontology_Development#Editing_the_Ontology). 

[Status pages](https://geneontology.github.io/go-ontology/) — ontology developers can review changes in the repository since the last official ontology release

## Ontology Pipeline Overview

 - GitHub Actions performs tests on every commit or pull request - https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/actions?query=workflow%3ACI
 - A Jenkins job produces SNAPSHOT releases every second day- https://build.geneontology.org/job/geneontology/job/pipeline/job/snapshot/
    * The S3 bucket for go-data-product-snapshot/ontology/, mapped to http://snapshot.geneontology.org/ontology/, is redirected to from the OBO Library PURL (http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/go/snapshot/FOO)
 - A Jenkins job produces monthly production releases (https://build.geneontology.org/job/geneontology/job/pipeline/job/release/)

input.content:
# Summary of Changes for Issue #31863

## New Term Created: GO:7770062 vesicle membrane tethering activity

### Definition
A membrane-membrane adaptor activity that provides the first point of contact and physically bridges the vesicle membrane and its target membrane prior to vesicle docking and fusion.

### Metadata
- **Namespace**: molecular_function
- **Parent term**: GO:0140177 (membrane-membrane adaptor activity)
- **References**: 
  - PMID:19887069 (Sztul & Lupashin 2009 — ER-Golgi membrane traffic)
  - PMID:19575650 (Yu & Hughson 2010 — broad review of tethering factors including synaptic vesicle components)
- **Synonyms**:
  - "vesicle membrane tether activity" (EXACT)
  - "vesicle tethering activity" (EXACT)
- **Created by**: dragon-ai-agent
- **Creation date**: 2026-04-13T23:43:55Z
- **Term tracker**: https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/31863

## Parent Term Modified: GO:0140177 membrane-membrane adaptor activity

### Definition Update
**Original**: The binding activity of a molecule that brings together two membranes, either via membrane lipid binding or by interacting with a membrane protein, to establish or maintain the localization of the protein, protein complex or organelle.

**Updated**: The binding activity of a molecule that brings together two membranes, either via membrane lipid binding or by interacting with a membrane protein, to establish or maintain the localization of the protein, protein complex, vesicle or organelle.

**Rationale**: Extended the definition to explicitly include vesicles as entities whose localization can be established or maintained through membrane-membrane adaptor activity, in preparation for the new child term GO:7770062.

## Validation
- Term structure and relationships conform to GO design patterns
- Definition properly references established literature through PMIDs
- Metadata includes required term_tracker_item property
- All changes have been integrated into src/ontology/go-edit.obo

## Checklist
- [x] New term created with proper ID (GO:7770062)
- [x] Definition includes references (PMID:19887069, PMID:19575650)
- [x] Parent term verified and properly linked
- [x] Synonyms added with appropriate scope tags
- [x] Metadata complete (created_by, creation_date, term_tracker_item)
- [x] Parent term definition extended to include "vesicle"
- [x] Changes integrated into ontology file
- [x] Aligned with issue requirements and comments
